creator: lane@joeandlane.com
text:
Yesterday I ran portupgrade -arR after cvsupping src-all, src-contrib, and ports-all

portupgrade told me to run pkgdb -F, so I did.  Then I ran portupgrade -arR all through yesterday.

This morning, after it was finished, I ran it again to make sure nothing was missed.  Oddly, it told me again to run pkgdb -F.  So I did.  The output is listed below - I just hit <ENTER> through the various prompts.

BTW: portupgrade upgraded kde to 3.5.3, so I don't know why kde-3.5.2 has a lock on gnu-libtool-1.5.20 - it's supposed to be gone, but isn't.

Also, I see that /usr/local/sbin/pkgdb and /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade were upgraded overnight to version 2.0.1.  They seemed to work yesterday.  And I suppose portupgrade is still working, I just can't get past pkgdb right now.
